spikes.note: two abilities for early poke trades
first item (Manamune/Sheen line) is his real spike
two-item Ezreal starts poking hard from safety

Ezreal.notes: Safe, mobile poke ADC. Not an all-in laner; wants to whittle down and scale.

spikes.note: has her ult (RQ/RE) from level 1 — strong early poke and shield

Karma.notes: Poke + disengage enchanter. Shield+speed lets a carry kite; RQ mandate poke is strong early.

spikes.note: Shockwave unlocks her teamfight/wombo threat
Lost Chapter item — mana and burst online

Orianna.notes: Control mage that scales hard. Her ult is the wombo payoff behind Ornn/Sejuani engage.

spikes.note: Ram/Ult combo gives long-range engage and a second knockup
self-forged items + team upgrades make his team spike as a unit

Ornn.notes: Scaling engage tank who upgrades allied items. Front-to-back and wombo enabler.

spikes.note: Glacial Prison — long-range hard engage for the wombo

Sejuani.notes: Tank engage jungler. Permafrost stun + ult chains with Ornn/Orianna for a wombo fight.

spikes.note: trap+net combo gives the strongest level-2 all-in in bot lane
first crit item — sieges towers with traps and range

Caitlyn.notes: Longest-range ADC. Dominant early lane bully who zones with 650 range and traps.

spikes.note: Hook is a threat from minute one

Blitzcrank.notes: One hook can end a lane or a game. All his pressure is the hook; when it's down he is nearly useless.

spikes.note: point-and-click stun all-in at level 2/3
empowered ult all-in and dive threat

Renekton.notes: Early-game lane tyrant who wants to snowball a lead before he falls off hard.

spikes.note: full kit online — strongest early-gank jungler

LeeSin.notes: Early skirmish jungler. Wants to gank and snowball lanes before his damage falls off.

spikes.note: chain+combo can kill a squishy already
first item makes her one-shot squishies

LeBlanc.notes: Roaming burst assassin. Deletes squishies mid-game; struggles to close out very late.

spikes.note: two-item Jinx is a teamfight monster with reset potential
peak hypercarry — melts the whole team if left alone

Jinx.notes: Immobile hypercarry. Must be protected; wins any game that reaches three items.

spikes.note: first enchanter item makes her shields/heals matter in fights

Lulu.notes: Hard-peel enchanter. Keeps a hypercarry alive; polymorph and ult shut down divers.

spikes.note: armor item makes him nearly unkillable vs AD and a wombo threat
Unstoppable Force — game-swinging AoE knockup engage

Malphite.notes: Point-and-click AoE engage ult. The classic wombo starter; weak early, strong once he has armor.

spikes.note: first enchanter item makes her heals and E-empower matter

Nami.notes: Tempo enchanter. Bubble is her defensive answer to engage, not a poke tool.

spikes.note: E+Q all-in is a lane-defining level-2 spike

Leona.notes: All-in engage support with no poke. If her all-in fails, she does nothing.

spikes.note: two crit items — dashes through minions and dukes damage

Yasuo.notes: Wants allied knockups to ult off. Pairs with wombo engage; punished by poke and disengage.
